mapper.select: SELECT MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS_SEQ.NEXTVAL as lSeq FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS SELECT LMS.CONTRACT_NUM , LMS.SUBSCRIBER_NO , LMS.RATE_CD , LMS.RATE_NM , LMS.REQ_BUY_TYPE , LMS.ENGG_MNTH_CNT , LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY , LMS.MODEL_PRICE , LMS.MODEL_PRICE_VAT , LMS.MODEL_DISCOUNT2 , LMS.MODEL_DISCOUNT3 , LMS.MODEL_INSTALLMENT , LMS.REAL_MDL_INSTAMT , LMS.BASE_AMT , LMS.DC_AMT , LMS.ADD_DC_AMT , TRUNC((LMS.BASE_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.DC_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.ADD_DC_AMT_P), 0) MONTH_RATE_AMT /* , (DECODE(LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0, 0, TRUNC((LMS.MODEL_INSTALLMENT / LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY), 0) + LMS.INST_CMSN)) MONTH_MODEL_AMT */ , DECODE(LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0, 0, ROUND((LMS.MODEL_INSTALLMENT + LMS.INST_CMSN) / LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0)) MONTH_MODEL_AMT /* , TRUNC((LMS.BASE_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.DC_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.ADD_DC_AMT_P), 0) + (DECODE(LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0, 0, TRUNC((LMS.MODEL_INSTALLMENT / LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY), 0) + LMS.INST_CMSN)) MONTH_AMT */ , TRUNC((LMS.BASE_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.DC_AMT_VAT_P - LMS.ADD_DC_AMT_P), 0) + DECODE(LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0, 0, ROUND((LMS.MODEL_INSTALLMENT + LMS.INST_CMSN) / LMS.MODEL_MONTHLY, 0)) MONTH_AMT , LMS.INST_CMSN , LMS.UD , LMS.BL_DC_TYPE , LMS.TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_12 , LMS.TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_18 , LMS.STATE_CD , LMS.STATE_DESC , LMS.MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS_SEQ , '' AS LMS , LMS.REGST_ID , LMS.REGST_DTTM , LMS.RVISN_ID , LMS.RVISN_DTTM FROM (SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM /* 계약번호 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO /* 전화번호 */ , MRM.RATE_CD , MRM.RATE_NM , REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE /* 구매유형 MM/UU */ , SALE.ENGG_MNTH_CNT /* 약정개월 */ , SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY /* 할부개월 */ /* --------------------------------------------------------------- */ /* 출력값 */ , NVL(SALE.MODEL_PRICE, 0) MODEL_PRICE /* 출고가 : VAT 없음*/ , NVL(SALE.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, 0) MODEL_PRICE_VAT /* 출고가(VAT) */ , NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) MODEL_DISCOUNT2 /* 공시지원금 */ , NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0) MODEL_DISCOUNT3 /* 추가지원금 */ , NVL(SALE.MODEL_INSTALLMENT, 0) MODEL_INSTALLMENT /* 할부원금 : 출고가 + 출고가(VAT) - 공시지원금 - 추가지원금 */ , (NVL(SALE.MODEL_PRICE, 0) + NVL(SALE.MODEL_PRICE_VAT, 0)) REAL_MDL_INSTAMT /* 실제할부원금 : 출고가 + 출고가(VAT) */ , NVL(MRM.BASE_AMT, 0) BASE_AMT /* 기본요금 VAT 미포함 */ , (NVL(MRM.BASE_AMT, 0) + (NVL(MRM.BASE_AMT, 0) * 0.1)) BASE_AMT_VAT_P , NVL(SALE.DC_AMT, 0) DC_AMT /* 기본할인 VAT 미포함 */ , (NVL(SALE.DC_AMT, 0) + (NVL(SALE.DC_AMT, 0) * 0.1)) DC_AMT_VAT_P , NVL(SALE.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) ADD_DC_AMT /* 요금할인 VAT 미포함 */ , (NVL(SALE.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) + (NVL(SALE.ADD_DC_AMT, 0) * 0.1)) ADD_DC_AMT_P /* 김용문 2017-11-06 , TRUNC(NVL(SALE.MODEL_INSTALLMENT, 0) * ((SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0051' AND CD_VAL = '20') / 100), 0) INST_CMSN */ , CASE WHEN (POWER((1 + 0.059 / 12), SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY) - 1) > 0 THEN TRUNC((SALE.MODEL_INSTALLMENT * 0.059 / 12 * POWER((1 + 0.059 / 12), SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY) / (POWER((1 + 0.059 / 12), SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY) - 1)), 0) * SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY - SALE.MODEL_INSTALLMENT WHEN (POWER((1 + 0.059 / 12), SALE.MODEL_MONTHLY) - 1) = 0 THEN 0 END INST_CMSN /* --------------------------------------------------------------- */ , CASE WHEN (MRM.BASE_AMT * 0.282) > SALE.DC_AMT THEN 'D' ELSE 'U' END UD , #{blDcType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS BL_DC_TYPE
, ROUND((NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) + NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0)) * (730 - 365) / 730, 0) AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_12 , ROUND((NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT2, 0) + NVL(SALE.MODEL_DISCOUNT3, 0)) * (730 - 548) / 730, 0) AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_18
, 0 AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_12 , 0 AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_18
, 0 AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_12 , 0 AS TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_18
, '0001' AS STATE_CD , 'BATCH INSERT' AS STATE_DESC , #{mspRateCancelLmsSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AS MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS_SEQ , 'BATCH' AS REGST_ID , SYSDATE AS REGST_DTTM , 'BATCH' AS RVISN_ID , SYSDATE AS RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST REQ , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO SALE , MSP_RATE_MST MRM WHERE 1=1 AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND REQ.REQUEST_KEY = SALE.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND SALE.SOC_CODE = MRM.RATE_CD(+) AND SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') /* [MSP0003] - "A:사용중,C:해지,R:예약,S:정지" */ AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'A' AND SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD IN (SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE 1=1 AND GRP_ID = 'RCP9018' AND USG_YN = 'Y') /* [RCP9004] - "MM:단말구매,UU:유심단독구매" */
AND REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'MM'
AND REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'MM'
AND REQ.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU'
/* [CMN0032] - "PP:선불,PO:후불" */ AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND BL_DC_TYPE = 'KD' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND BL_DC_TYPE = 'PM' )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND SIM_ID IS NOT NULL )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS MRCL WHERE MRCL.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)) LMS
mapper.select: SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , SUBSCRIBER_NO , RATE_CD , RATE_NM , REQ_BUY_TYPE , ENGG_MNTH_CNT , MODEL_MONTHLY , MODEL_PRICE , MODEL_PRICE_VAT , MODEL_DISCOUNT2 , MODEL_DISCOUNT3 , (MODEL_DISCOUNT2 + MODEL_DISCOUNT3) MODEL_DISCOUNT , MODEL_INSTALLMENT , REAL_MDL_INSTAMT , (BASE_AMT + (BASE_AMT * 0.1)) BASE_AMT , (DC_AMT + (DC_AMT * 0.1)) DC_AMT , (ADD_DC_AMT + (ADD_DC_AMT * 0.1)) ADD_DC_AMT , MONTH_RATE_AMT , MONTH_MODEL_AMT , MONTH_AMT , INST_CMSN , UD , BL_DC_TYPE , MODEL_DISCOUNT2 , MODEL_DISCOUNT3 , TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_12 , TERMINAL_RATE_CANCEL_FEE_18 , STATE_CD , STATE_DESC , MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS_SEQ FROM MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS WHERE 1=1 AND MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS_SEQ = #{mspRateCancelLmsSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT TRUNC((NVL(B.CC_AMT12, 0) + (NVL(B.CC_AMT12, 0) * 0.1)), 0) CC_AMT12 , TRUNC((NVL(B.CC_AMT18, 0) + (NVL(B.CC_AMT18, 0) * 0.1)), 0) CC_AMT18 FROM MSP_RATE_CANCEL_LMS A , MSP_RATE_CANCEL_SPEC B WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = B.RATE_CD AND A.ENGG_MNTH_CNT = B.AGRM_TRM AND A.BL_DC_TYPE = B.SPRT_TP AND B.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231235959' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
